ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has been confirmed!
ham.body:
Hi [Customer Name],

Thanks for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been successfully placed and is now confirmed. Here are the details:

• Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
• Items:
   - "Wireless Earbuds – Black" (Qty 1)
   - "USB-C Cable 1m" (Qty 2)
• Order Total: ₹3,200
• Shipping Address: 12, MG Road, Bangalore - 560001
• Estimated Delivery: 3-5 business days

Your payment has been processed and you will receive a confirmation email from your bank shortly. To track your shipment, click the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for choosing Amazon. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

Happy Shopping!

Best Regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Payroll Update Confirmation Needed
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

We hope you are well. This is the HR Payroll Department at XYZ Pvt Ltd. Our records show that your recent salary disbursement for the month of March has not been successfully credited due to a missing banking detail. To ensure you receive your rightful payment without any delay, please verify your banking information by clicking the secure link below within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so may result in temporary suspension of your payroll until the issue is resolved.

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,

Rohan Mehta
HR Payroll Officer
XYZ Pvt Ltd
Contact: hrpayroll@xyzpvt.com
